title: 5,000 Spheres Under the Ice in Antarctica
description:
Why are these 5,000 basketball-sized spheres deep under the ice in Antarctica? 

It’s an observatory all the way down at the bottom of the world. It spans over a cubic kilometer in size and involves drilling 2500m below the surface. 

It was a massive undertaking requiring tons of resources... so how did they do it?

#IceCube #Antarctica #Science #Technology #shorts
